response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, including recent hands-on work with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. Strong testing culture (TDD, test framework authorship, testing workshops) and demonstrated architecture ownership across web, backend, and infrastructure. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and Kotlin is absent, though Java experience partially covers the secondary stack.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles, including high-scale systems
Current AI-agent development and MCP infrastructure experience, a hard-to-find required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up
No Kotlin exposure; Java experience appears dated (robotics work ~2016-2018)
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem may mean less depth in the modern JVM/enterprise toolchain
